name: DiagSendResponsePDU
title: DiagSendResponsePDU
description: Sends a raw byte buffer. E.g. this allows sending responses with invalid protocol headers.
return: On success 0, otherwise a value less than 0.
availability: K-Line Real bus mode Online mode ECU simulation
